values.label: Exceptions, including reset, taken to A32 state.
Exceptions, including reset, taken to T32 state.

fields.name: RES1
fields.description: Reserved, RES1.

fields.name: RES0
fields.description: Reserved, RES0.

fields.name: EE
fields.description: The value of the PSTATE.E bit on branch to an exception vector or coming out of reset.

values.label: Little-endian. PSTATE.E is cleared to 0 on taking an exception or coming out of reset.
Big-endian. PSTATE.E is set to 1 on taking an exception or coming out of reset.

fields.name: RES0
fields.description: Reserved, RES0.

fields.name: RES1
fields.description: Reserved, RES1.

fields.name: FI
fields.description: Fast Interrupts enable. This bit is a read-only copy of the HSCTLR.FI bit.

fields.name: UWXN
fields.description: Unprivileged write permission implies EL1 XN. Can force regions writable at EL0 to be XN for EL1 accesses.

values.label: This control has no effect on memory access permissions.
Any region that is writable at EL0 is forced to XN for accesses from EL1.

fields.name: WXN
fields.description: Write permission implies XN (Execute-never) for the EL1&0 MPU translation regime.

values.label: This control has no effect on memory access permissions.
Any region that is writable in the EL1&0 translation regime is forced to XN for accesses from EL1 or EL0.

fields.name: nTWE
fields.description: Traps EL0 execution of WFE instructions to Undefined mode.

values.label: Any attempt to execute a WFE instruction at EL0 is trapped to Undefined mode if it would cause a low-power state.
This control has no effect on the EL0 execution of WFE instruction.

fields.name: BR
fields.description: Background Region enable. When the EL1 MPU is enabled, controls how EL1 accesses not matching any MPU region are handled.

values.label: EL1 MPU Background region disabled. Any EL1 transaction not matching an EL1 MPU region results in a fault.
EL1 MPU Background region enabled. Transactions not matching an EL1 MPU region use Background region attributes.

fields.name: nTWI
fields.description: Traps EL0 execution of WFI instructions to Undefined mode.

values.label: Any attempt to execute a WFI instruction at EL0 is trapped to Undefined mode if it would cause a low-power state.
This control has no effect on the EL0 execution of WFI instructions.

fields.name: RES0
fields.description: Reserved, RES0.

fields.name: I
fields.description: Instruction access Cacheability control for accesses at EL1 and EL0.

values.label: All instruction access to Normal memory from EL1 and EL0 are Non-cacheable.
All instruction access to Normal memory from EL1 and EL0 can be cached at all levels.

fields.name: RES1
fields.description: Reserved, RES1.

fields.name: RES0
fields.description: Reserved, RES0.

fields.name: SED
fields.description: SETEND instruction disable. Disables SETEND instructions at EL0 and EL1.

values.label: SETEND instruction execution is enabled at EL0 and EL1.
SETEND instructions are UNDEFINED at EL0 and EL1.

fields.name: ITD
fields.description: IT Disable. Disables some uses of IT instructions at EL1 and EL0.

values.label: All IT instruction functionality is enabled at EL1 and EL0.
Any attempt at EL1 or EL0 to execute certain IT-related instruction sequences is UNDEFINED.

fields.name: UNK
fields.description: Writes to this bit are IGNORED. Reads return an UNKNOWN value.

fields.name: CP15BEN
fields.description: System instruction memory barrier enable. Enables DMB, DSB, and ISB System instructions (coproc==1111) from EL1 and EL0.

values.label: EL0 and EL1 execution of the CP15DMB, CP15DSB, and CP15ISB instructions is UNDEFINED.
EL0 and EL1 execution of the CP15DMB, CP15DSB, and CP15ISB instructions is enabled.

fields.name: RES1
fields.description: Reserved, RES1.

fields.name: C
fields.description: Cacheability control for data accesses at EL1 and EL0.

values.label: All data access to Normal memory from EL1 and EL0 are Non-cacheable.
All data access to Normal memory from EL1 and EL0 can be cached at all levels.

fields.name: A
fields.description: Alignment check enable. Enable bit for Alignment fault checking at EL1 and EL0.

values.label: Alignment fault checking disabled when executing at EL1 or EL0.
Alignment fault checking enabled when executing at EL1 or EL0.

fields.name: M
fields.description: MPU enable for the EL1 MPU.

values.label: EL1 MPU disabled.
EL1 MPU enabled.
